# frontend-review-testing

> Use when auditing test infrastructure — vitest coverage, playwright configuration, VRT setup, coverage merging. Produces recommendations for Week 2 testing phase. Runs `scripts/audit-coverage.sh`.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/frontend/review-testing
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/frontend/review-testing
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
